---
name: "volundr"
description: "**FIGMA WORKFLOW SKILL** — VOLUNDR (Documentation Generator): generates FDS-style component documentation directly on the component's Figma page. Extracts variant structure and control props, builds Block 1–6 frames following the FDS template. USE FOR: creating or updating FDS component documentation in Figma; extracting control props from component variants; generating variant group layouts. NOT FOR: token writes (use mimr); layout restructuring (use vali); code generation (use saga). INPUTS NEEDED: {figma_component_url}."
agent: agent
argument-hint: "Figma component URL or node id"
---
